question: What two abilities do Phantom 'Wraith-Riders' possess while mounted?

answers.original: Phantom Wraith-Riders can perform **Phase-Gallops** to run through solid matter and **Spirit-Charges** to become temporarily incorporeal during attacks.
answers.perturbed: Phantom Wraith-Riders can perform Spirit-Charges to become temporarily incorporeal during attacks and require bonding with a Phantom Steed for training.

ops.description: Light-Forged items are the result of the Light-Forging process.
The old kingdom of Eldoria had many secrets.

entities.name: Phantom Wraith-Riders
entities.description: Phantom Wraith-Riders are elite cavalry members who can perform special maneuvers with their spectral steeds.

entities.name: Phantom Armies
entities.description: Phantom Armies are military units that include Phantom Wraith-Riders as elite cavalry.

entities.name: Phantom Steed
entities.description: Phantom Steed is a spectral horse used by Phantom Wraith-Riders.

entities.name: Spirit-Charges
entities.description: Spirit-Charges are maneuvers where both Phantom Wraith-Rider and mount become temporarily incorporeal during attacks.

relations.description: Phantom Wraith-Riders can perform Phase-Gallops to run through solid matter.
Phantom Wraith-Riders can perform Spirit-Charges to become temporarily incorporeal during attacks.
Phantom Wraith-Riders serve as elite cavalry for the Phantom Armies.
Phantom Wraith-Riders require bonding with a Phantom Steed for training.
Wraith-Stables house dozens of spectral horses.
Night-Marshal commands all Phantom Wraith-Rider units.
Phantom Culture values honor in battle, which is reflected in the actions of Phantom Wraith-Riders.
